paragraphs.body: During my junior year as an upcoming athlete, I had a favorite player named Tank Dell. I Just loved the way he played the game and how his playing style was similar to mine. Tank Dell was approaching his last college game, and it was going to be in my hometown, and as soon as I found out that it was going to be in my hometown I knew for sure that I had a chance to see my favorite player play in person. So, I went to the game, and I watched Tanks last game. This was a very spectacular moment for me to watch him score 2 touchdowns, I really learned a lot from him playing, from seeing him in person. After the game I rushed to the field and I got a chance to talk to Tank Dell and Get a picture with him and we were talking and Tank was telling me to “ Keep pushing and grinding lil brudda you are goanna make it” and I took that and ran with it I don't let anything bring me down from achieving my goals and from me handling my business. After the conversation, I asked Tank Dell for his football gloves, and when he took them off and gave me his gloves, it meant a lot to me, and I cherish them. Ever since I wore the gloves in my first game I went off wearing gloves. I had one of the biggest games I ever had so I was like to gloves gave me Goodluck so for the rest of my junior season I wooer the gloves.

annotations.comment: Nice job starting with narrative! Great details and authentic voice. Just watch out for run-on/fused sentences.
annotations.context_right: Tanks last game. This was a very spectacular moment for me to watch him score 2

paragraphs.body: These football gloves are very important for me not just because of Tank Dell was wearing them and he past them down to me but, Tank Dell is one of my favorite players and it was just amazing how I got to wear the same gloves as Tank, and he put his blood sweat and tears into playing the game that I love as well, so when he gave me gloves I felt some inspiration in my body to play just like him even though I try to mimic everything he do. When I went into my junior season I started to wear Tanks dells gloves for the first time and I was having an amazing season starting off hot going into the year, I just knew that this was going to be the biggest year yet for me, and I knew that I was going to have to play with that mamba mentality for me to get recognized because I going to my junior year as a underrated receiver.

Me getting these gloves at great shape and these gloves having the grip other gloves they are very sticky so with me being able to catch, I will be able to catch everything. Gloves offer some degree of protection to the hands and fingers from abrasions, impacts, and potential injuries during tackles or when making catches in high pressure situations. You should want the gloves to fit and be flexible for you to be able to move your hands inside of the gloves. Some gloves have padding on top of the gloves to keep your hands safe when going through catching in contact, other gloves may not have padding in them you so many options of gloves to pick from, everyone has a different opinion on what they prefer on like different passion on the field. Like mostly bigger skill positions on the field may prefer padded gloves other than some wide receivers on the field, such as Tank Dell, he handed me down padded gloves and I really like padded gloves as well, because majority of my catch be in traffic or over someone's head.

annotations.comment: Nice start to a descriptive paragraph! Remember to describe with sensory details. And think about how the "right" details can create an effective tone and message for your essay's central focusing idea. We might discuss what the metaphor of the gloves are for you. This would help you focus both your description and the big ideas you develop for your essay as a whole.
annotations.context_left: inside of the gloves. Some gloves have padding on top of the gloves to keep your hands

paragraphs.body: These gloves remind that one of the best players gave me these gloves so I can't represent him bad by messing up what I got going so I got to handle my business but me playing with these gloves remind me that I can't play around my teams could possible make fun of me saying that “you playing trash with Tank dells glove you dead wrong” so it reminds me that I have to put on for the Boot where I'm from and if I want to make it out I got to go crazy every single game that I play and show other coaches that I have to ability to play at the next level. So that gives me all of the inspiration that I need for me to have the ability to show my talent that the good Lord bless me with, because you can achieve anything possible with believing and having that inspiration to want to do it, to want to go to the next level be a star just like Tank Dell, because I'm sure he was looking up to someone as well when he was in my shoes, and looking at that person and to be just like him and having that inspiration to accomplish the impossible in being a undersized wide receiver coming up. Thats why you must have that dog mentality and have the inspiration to have it in you to work harder than others, you must work 2x as harder than another no and or buts that comes with it by being an undersized wide receiver. So when you wide receivers in the NFL like Tank Dell they had the inspiration to be on top of the game, and wanting to be the best that they can be possible and out work everyone that they possibly can to make it out of the ghetto or whatever situation that they are going through, and being that type of person by going through so much as and young child or young adult seeing your parents struggling trying to pay multiple bills and stressing, and seeing your parents go through that and stressing it drive you to be the best and have that inspiring, inspiration that your parents have to pay the bills and take care of you. It's just comes down to you, do you want to end up that like them or you use what they give you and make it out and have that inspiration to use you God giving ability to play the sport that you love and make it out and have a plan to provide for your family, and take care of you parents and pay them back for all of the hard work that they did for you.

paragraphs.body: Me wearing the gloves that Tank Dell wore, and he passed down to me, and me getting a chance to see him in live action and see how he singlehandedly destroyed the University of Lafeyette Louisiana with that mamba mentality and using those gloves that he gave me after the game. Ever since I started wearing those gloves, I just feel like I have great wonderful luck with playing with gloves, so I decided to wear the gloves my senior year to every game, and I was breaking records and doing more, and I became one of the best wide receivers to ever come of an Academy. I achieved my goals, and I signed to the University of Pittsburgh and after I did that, I wanted to pass the gloves down to someone on my team, to someone younger than me and I knew that he is going to bring that mamba mentality and have the inspiration that me and Tank Dell had and show the world his talent.

annotations.text: wanted to pass the gloves down to someone on my team, to someone younger than me and I knew that he is going to bring that mamba mentality and have the inspiration that me and Tank Dell had and show the world his talent.
